elements.title: Indian Communist Party
elements.contents: ... that the Indian Communist Party distinguished itself from the Communist Party of India by using a yellow hammer and sickle on its flag (pictured)?

elements.title: Queen Plaisance
elements.contents: ... that Queen Plaisance was chastised for carrying on with another woman's husband in a letter from the pope?

elements.title: Tujiaaspis
elements.contents: ... that Tujiaaspis had a single pair of ridge-like fins that may have been the precursors to human arms and legs?

elements.title: an International Booker Prize–nominated author
elements.contents: ... that an International Booker Prize–nominated author has also won several awards as an actress?

elements.title: Nightingales
elements.contents: ... that the book Nightingales argues against the theory that Florence Nightingale was a lesbian?

elements.title: a former police officer
elements.contents: ... that a former police officer who shared a cell with Jeffrey Epstein had been convicted of a quadruple murder?

elements.title: a Spanish tourist train
elements.contents: ... that lemon trees inspired a Spanish tourist train?

elements.title: Lorinda Roland
elements.contents: ... that both of Lorinda Roland's parents, maternal grandparents, and maternal aunts were actors?

elements.title: Make America Go Away
elements.contents: ... that some Greenlanders wear "MAGA" hats reading "Make America Go Away"?
